firstEmailBody:
Hey — I ran a quick audit on espacenavi.ca and found the first place I’d look for lost conversions.
One real signal: mobile performance came back around 34/100, FCP 2.9 s, LCP 9.7 s, TBT 1,990 ms.
I put the result here:
https://staffordmedia.ai/audit-result?store=espacenavi.ca
If I’m off, ignore this.
If I’m right, you can grab the exact first fix from there.
– Ross
secondEmailBody:
Following up on this.

The clearest issue I noticed on https://espacenavi.ca was No email capture detected.

The clearest issue still looks like shipping cost surprise. It came through as one of the stronger issues in the audit.

If helpful, I can send over the first change I'd test.

– Ross
thirdEmailBody:
Last note from me.

I still think No email capture detected is worth looking at. It came through as one of the stronger issues in the audit, with shipping cost surprise showing up clearly.

If you reply, I can send the first fix I'd test. If not, no problem.

– Ross
